title: Basque Chicken with Roast Potatoes
description: A hearty Basque-inspired dish featuring tender chicken and crispy roast potatoes.
instructions: Toss potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast potatoes in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy.
Season chicken breast with Basque paprika and salt.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Sear chicken breast until golden brown, then finish cooking in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve chicken with roasted potatoes and garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
